title: TMWS Announces Education Scholarship Drive
summary: Applications are open for merit and need-based scholarships supporting school and college students from member families.

title: August Medical Camp Registration Begins
summary: Register early for free consultations covering general medicine, ophthalmology, and basic diagnostic support.

title: Onam 2026 Planning Committee Formed
summary: Volunteers are invited to join cultural, logistics, and hospitality teams for this year’s Onam celebration.

title: Annual General Meeting Highlights
summary: Members reviewed yearly impact, approved new welfare initiatives, and elected coordinators for specialized wings.

title: Record Turnout at Blood Donation Drive
summary: Over 120 donors participated, reinforcing TMWS’s commitment to emergency medical readiness in the community.
